name: Job Application Tracker
description: Capture job postings and detect new portals. Reads only visible page metadata (Open Graph / meta tags) — never cookies or credentials.
_comment_host_permissions: http://localhost:8080/* is the backend gateway. <all_urls> lets the content script read visible metadata on any job page; this could be narrowed to a curated portal list once the known-portal domains are stable.
_comment_externally_connectable: TODO: replace http://localhost:5173/* with the deployed web-app origin. The web app calls chrome.runtime.sendMessage(EXTENSION_ID, {type:'SET_JWT', jwt}) after login to bridge the JWT into the extension. http://localhost:5173/* is the local Vite dev server.
_comment_icons: Icons are optional for local development. To ship, add PNGs and an "icons" key, e.g. "icons": { "128": "icons/icon128.png" } and an "action.default_icon".
